creator: gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
text:
new port: Bcfg2 helps system administrators produce a consistent, reproducible, and verifiable description of their environment, and offers visualization and reporting tools to aid in day-to-day administrative tasks.

WWW: http://www.bcfg2.org

Fix: 

http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/patches/new-ports/sysutils/bcfg2/
